title: Caiophora pentlandii
taxonomy: Caiophora pentlandii is a species of flowering plant in the family Loasaceae. It is native to Peru. The Loasaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the prickle-pod or loosia family. The Loasaceae family is part of the order Ericales. This family is native to the Americas.
